title: ASR Outdoor 38pc Deluxe Geology Rock Hounding Kit with Mining Tools and Carry

ASR Outdoor 38pc Deluxe Geology Rock Hounding Kit with Mining Tools and Carry

If rockhounding, gem mining, or fossils are a new hobby or interest, you’ll need the right tools to set yourself up for success in the field! From breaking up deposits to cleaning and examining materials, this 38pc ASR Outdoor rockhounding tools kit has you covered!

A must-have, this 20oz hammer features a rubberized grip for shock reduction; 11 inches in length and forged from one piece of steel, one side features a square face for hammering rock or driving chisels, while the opposing pointed tip allows you to crack open rocks or hard, dense material.

Key Features

  • DELUXE ROCKHOUNDING TOOLS KIT: If rockhounding, gem mining, or fossils are a new hobby or interest, you’ll need the right tools to set yourself up for success in the field! From breaking up deposits to cleaning and examining materials, this 38pc ASR Outdoor rockhounding tools kit has you covered!
  • ESSENTIAL ROCK HAMMER: A must-have, this 20oz hammer features a rubberized grip for shock reduction; 11 inches in length and forged from one piece of steel, one side features a square face for hammering rock or driving chisels, while the opposing pointed tip allows you to crack open rocks or hard, dense material
  • ROCKHOUNDING ACCESSORIES: Once you’ve made a mess in the field, you’re going to need to sort, examine and tidy up any newfound materials; this kit includes a mini steel wire mesh classifier to screen off larger unwanted raw materials, examination brushes, and a snifter bottle for more detailed cleaning work, plastic baggies and a magnification jewelers loupe
  • DELUXE NYLON TOTE BAG: The ASR Outdoor rock hounding bag features double-stitching at all stress points to ensure that it will last through years of prospecting or camping trips. It’s made of high-quality nylon that is naturally weather-resistant so you can count on it to protect your tools and supplies rain or shine. It has 13 different pockets and features quick-release buckles so you can access your tools quickly and easily.
  • KIT COMPONENTS INCLUDE: x1 hammer, x1 unisex gloves, x1 aluminum jeweler’s loupe, x1 goggles, x6 cleaning brushes, x1 mini classifier sieve, x1 snifter bottle, x1 carabiner, x6 plastic baggies, x1 tweezers, x1 chisel, x1 set of aluminum containers and x1 nylon tool bag

Product Specifications

  • MPN: EOGORSA3
  • UPC: 810058480927
  • Color: Green
  • Size: 38pc

Once you’ve made a mess in the field, you’re going to need to sort, examine and tidy up any newfound materials; this kit includes a mini steel wire mesh classifier to screen off larger unwanted raw materials, examination brushes, and a snifter bottle for more detailed cleaning work, plastic baggies and a magnification jewelers loupe.

The ASR Outdoor rock hounding bag features double-stitching at all stress points to ensure that it will last through years of prospecting or camping trips. It’s made of high-quality nylon that is naturally weather-resistant so you can count on it to protect your tools and supplies rain or shine. It has 13 different pockets and features quick-release buckles so you can access your tools quickly and easily.

Whether you’re on the hunt for emeralds in North Carolina, jade in Big Sur, California, or fossils in Wyoming, this rockhounding kit from ASR Outdoor will have you organized and prepared for your next mineral mining adventure. Good luck!
